action_set_definitions.name: get_precinct_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current data for a specific precinct, including machine counts, manual counts, and current workflow status.

precinct_id.description: The unique identifier for the precinct (e.g., 'PRECINCT_088').

action_set_definitions.name: get_discrepancy_report
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the detailed forensic report for a specific discrepancy ID, providing context on seal mismatches or transit issues.

discrepancy_id.description: The ID of the discrepancy to investigate (e.g., 'ERR-992').

action_set_definitions.name: query_transit_logs
action_set_definitions.description: Accesses the logistics and chain-of-custody database to investigate timing delays and unauthorized stops for a specific precinct's container.

action_set_definitions.name: perform_three_point_verification
action_set_definitions.description: Executes a reconciliation between machine counts, manual counts, and the official poll book/voter registry to ensure total data integrity.

action_set_definitions.name: update_precinct_resolution
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the terminal status of the precinct in the environment state based on the investigation outcome.

resolution_state.description: The final determination for the precinct.

justification.description: A detailed explanation of why the status was cured or escalated, referencing the seal and transit evidence.

state_description.precincts: A map of precinct IDs to their respective ballot data, including machine_count, manual_count, and status (e.g., 'pending', 'recounting', 'verified').
state_description.discrepancies: A list of identified count mismatches requiring investigation.
state_description.audit_log: An internal history of all audit actions taken and their outcomes.
state_description.total_registered_voters: The official number of registered voters used to validate turn-out logic.

discrepancies.description: Transit time exceeded 90-minute threshold; physical seal SN-995 does not match Transfer Log SN-881.

audit_log: 2024-11-05 21:00:00 - Precinct 088: Transit initiated via bipartisan team.
2024-11-05 22:45:00 - Central Count: Container arrived. Receiving team flagged seal mismatch.
2024-11-05 22:48:00 - Quarantine: Container ERR-992 moved to Impound Area B for investigation.
